title: bromus multiflorus var. arduennensis
intro: Bromus multiflorus var. arduennensis, also known as the many-flowered brome, is a variant of the perennial grass species Bromus multiflorus. This plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The many-flowered brome is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, which can be administered internally to harness its medicinal properties.
